name: @openhoo/digihoo
description: TypeScript SDK for Digi-Key API authentication and Product Information endpoints.

scripts.generate:types: mkdir -p src/generated && swagger2openapi --outfile /tmp/digikey-product-search-openapi.json https://developer.digikey.com/node/2357/oas-download && openapi-typescript /tmp/digikey-product-search-openapi.json --output src/generated/product-search-v4.ts && swagger2openapi --outfile /tmp/digikey-product-change-notifications-openapi.json https://developer.digikey.com/node/3668/oas-download && openapi-typescript /tmp/digikey-product-change-notifications-openapi.json --output src/generated/product-change-notifications-v3.ts && swagger2openapi --outfile /tmp/digikey-mylists-openapi.json https://developer.digikey.com/node/2657/oas-download && openapi-typescript /tmp/digikey-mylists-openapi.json --output src/generated/mylists-v1.ts && swagger2openapi --outfile /tmp/digikey-ordering-openapi.json https://developer.digikey.com/node/4546/oas-download && openapi-typescript /tmp/digikey-ordering-openapi.json --output src/generated/ordering-v3.ts && swagger2openapi --outfile /tmp/digikey-barcoding-openapi.json https://developer.digikey.com/node/3626/oas-download && openapi-typescript /tmp/digikey-barcoding-openapi.json --output src/generated/barcoding-v3.ts && swagger2openapi --outfile /tmp/digikey-packing-list-openapi.json https://developer.digikey.com/node/3851/oas-download && openapi-typescript /tmp/digikey-packing-list-openapi.json --output src/generated/packing-list-v1.ts && swagger2openapi --outfile /tmp/digikey-order-status-openapi.json https://developer.digikey.com/node/2288/oas-download && openapi-typescript /tmp/digikey-order-status-openapi.json --output src/generated/order-status-v4.ts
scripts.check: bun run biome:check && bun run typecheck && bun run test:coverage && bun run build
scripts.hooks:install: if git rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1; then git config core.hooksPath .githooks; fi
scripts.verify: bun run generate:types && bun run typecheck && bun run test:coverage && bun run build
